protein_name: Activates both Ras-dependent and Ras-independent migratory pathways in melanomas. Contributes to the early phases of agrin-induced tyrosine phosphorylation of CHRNB1. Only expressed in melanomas. Weakly expressed in normal melanocytes and benign nevi. Highly expressed at the transition from radial growth phase to vertical growth phase and metastatic melanomas, when tumor cells acquire migratory competence and invasive potential. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
